games.title: PixelSports — Free Browser Hub
games.short_description: Free browser hub — volleyball, dorodango, bocce, curling, golf. Procedural pixel art. JimmyTheHat.

PIXELSPORTS · FREE BROWSER HUB · v0.2 SLATE · JIMMYTHEHAT

No paywall. Play everything in your browser — one hub links to every game.
Procedural pixel art built in code. Fleet links to Yes Man, Driving Me Nuts, and more.

games.title: Yes Man
